Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class AnalyticsSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.AnalyticsSettings2
public class AnalyticsSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for AnalyticsSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AnalyticsSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AlwaysGenPreviews" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
